scripts.dev: npm run content:validate && WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=.wrangler/wrangler.log vinext dev
scripts.build: npm run content:validate && WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=.wrangler/wrangler.log vinext build
scripts.build:pages: npm run content:validate && GITHUB_PAGES=true next build
scripts.test: npm run test:model && npm run build && node --test tests/rendered-html.test.mjs
scripts.test:model: node --experimental-strip-types --test tests/conference-model.test.mjs tests/content-boundary.test.mjs tests/content-migration.test.mjs tests/content-validation.test.mjs tests/globe-label-collisions.test.mjs
scripts.test:pages: npm run build:pages && npm run verify:pages
